Get Started
Get Started

Available Puppies

Meet our happy, healthy puppies—lovingly raised in a nurturing environment with the highest standards of care, socialization, and ethical breeding practices. Each one is ready to bring joy, companionship, and unconditional love to their forever home.

Available
Charlie

$1200

Yorkshire Terrier 6 Weeks

Charlie is a playful, curious pup who loves treats and chasing butterflies!

Inquire

$1400

Yorkshire Terriers 4 Weeks

Luna is a gentle and loving pup who enjoys cuddling up in cozy blankets.

Yorkshire Terrier 6 Weeks

Daisy is an energetic pup who loves walks and making friends at the park.

Yorkshire Terrier 6 Weeks

Upcoming Litters

Get ready to welcome new paws! These upcoming litters are lovingly planned to ensure healthy, well-tempered puppies raised in a nurturing environment.

The Willow Litter

Parents: Luna × Finn

Expected Date: June 15, 2025

This pairing brings together two incredibly gentle, affectionate Yorkshire Terriers. Known for their calm personalities and beautiful coats, Luna and Finn's pups will be ideal for families or therapy work.

Join Waitlist
The Maple Litter

Parents: Caesar × Mini

Expected Date: July 2, 2025

These Yorkshire Terrier pups will be small, smart, and irresistibly sweet. Perfect for allergy-sensitive homes, they're expected to have hypoallergenic coats and loving, intelligent personalities.

Join Waitlist

Our Adoption Process

We're here to make your journey to puppy parenthood smooth, transparent, and joyful—every step of the way.

01.
Application

Start by filling out our quick application form so we can learn more about you and match you with the right puppy.

02.
Approval

We'll review your application and reach out for a short conversation to ensure our puppies go to loving homes.

03.
Waitlist

Once approved, you'll join the waitlist for upcoming litters. We'll keep you updated with litter announcements.

04.
Homecoming

When your puppy is ready, you'll be invited to meet them. After final checks, you'll bring home a happy companion!

Fill Your Application
Your Puppy Journey Starts Here

Sign up to get updates on upcoming litters, and tips for new dog parents.

*We respect your privacy. No spam—just adorable puppies and helpful updates.
